name: DigScape
short_description: Build, mine, and manage your own industrial zone in this relaxing 3D simulation game. Plan production, automate systems, and expand your operations step by step as you create a thriving environment.
detailed_description:
🪓 About the Game

DigScape is a relaxing 3D mining and management simulator focused on building, automation, and steady progression.
Start small, gather resources, and transform a quiet land into a thriving industrial zone.

Plan your layout, manage energy and production, and improve efficiency through upgrades and automation.
Whether you prefer calm, creative gameplay or strategic management, DigScape offers a rewarding experience built on growth and balance.

⚙️ Key Features

  • ⚒️ Mining & Resource Management – Extract and process valuable materials to fuel your progress.

  • 🏗️ Base Building – Expand your industrial area with machines, structures, and production systems.

  • ⚡ Automation & Upgrades – Boost efficiency through advanced tools and energy networks.

  • 💼 Strategic Planning – Balance your economy, power, and productivity for long-term success.

  • 🌅 Relaxing Experience – A peaceful simulator designed for creativity, growth, and discovery.
